# OrdonSooq

OrdonSooq (أوردن سوق) is an online marketplace in Jordan for electronics, computers, laptops, and tech accessories.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.ordonsooq.com/): Featured products and new arrivals
- [Search](https://www.ordonsooq.com/search): Product search and filters
- [Categories](https://www.ordonsooq.com/categories): Browse by category
- [Brands](https://www.ordonsooq.com/brands): Shop by brand
- [Stores](https://www.ordonsooq.com/vendors): Vendor storefronts
- [Contact](https://www.ordonsooq.com/contact): Customer support
- [Privacy](https://www.ordonsooq.com/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://www.ordonsooq.com/terms): Terms of service

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.ordonsooq.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable site map
- [Robots](https://www.ordonsooq.com/robots.txt): Crawler rules
